crime.quote: a hand was placed over her mouth, and she was dragged behind the school, away from the cars

victim.value: Amber, who becomes vulnerable by impersonating her twin sister
victim.quote: She was probably in some real trouble

closed_world.value: The school and surrounding area where the twin switch occurs
closed_world.quote: She looked around the empty hallways for a way out. A way out of the school

investigator.value: Amber, who discovers her twin and investigates their connection
investigator.quote: It was a mystery she'd tried to solve ever since running across a picture of someone

red_herring.value: Initial assumption that twins were separated at birth when actually they switched places deliberately
red_herring.quote: It could be that they were seperated at birth. Or one twin died, leaving the other one alone.

clue_fairness.value: Anonymous threatening text message with Joker image revealed to reader simultaneously with protagonist
clue_fairness.quote: You're not fooling anyone. Convince me or else. See you soon...Amber.

social_world.value: Foster care system versus wealthy biological family - class disparity between twins' environments
social_world.quote: despite what her foster mother had told her about the internet

media_and_audience.value: Facebook social media stalking enables the twin switch deception and identity research
media_and_audience.quote: she'd just gotten a facebook account despite what her foster mother had told her about the internet

investigator_wound.value: Amber's foster care abandonment issues drive obsessive need to connect with biological twin
investigator_wound.quote: It was a mystery she'd tried to solve ever since running across a picture of someone who looked exactly

_meta.title: ebook brianna jones born to lie
